hero.title: Hey, I'm Fabricio
hero.description: Egressed in Computer Systems Engineering from Universidad del Valle. Full-Stack Developer: frontend with Next.js, React, Astro, Tailwind & Figma, backend with Laravel & Firebase. At Reborn Developments and Rekaliber; own production projects like Hydraulic Sistem and Eipet. Former Team Leader at GoIT. DevOps with Hostinger, Netlify, and Cloudflare. From Cochabamba, Bolivia 🇧🇴.

note.description: I BUILD WEB PRODUCTS END-TO-END: STRONG FRONTEND SYSTEMS, SOLID BACKEND LOGIC, AND CLEAN DELIVERY TO PRODUCTION. FOCUSED ON PERFORMANCE, STRUCTURE, AND REAL BUSINESS IMPACT.

reborn.title: Full-Stack Developer
reborn.description: Full-stack development for Reborn Developments and Reborn Host. PHP Laravel backend and Next.js frontend for the international investment platform; Reborn Host with Next.js frontend and PHP for email delivery. Deployed both on Hostinger with Cloudflare connected for the domain.

rebornrental.title: Full-Stack Developer
rebornrental.description: Current role at Reborn Rental delivering both frontend and backend work. Led a creative project overhaul to improve product UX/UI and user flow, while extending and maintaining the website built with Blade and Laravel PHP.

goit.title: Full Stack Team Leader
goit.description: Team Leader of the full-stack project for the GOIT developers academy, developing a web/mobile platform with NextJS, Expo, and PostgreSQL. Led the integration of Moodle into the platform to manage educational content and enhance the learning experience for students.

rekaliber.title: Full-Stack Developer
rekaliber.description: All-in-one enterprise SaaS: credential vault with 2FA/TOTP, session proxy, workflow editor, task manager, team chat, and multi-LLM AI Hub with tool calling. I contributed full-stack to the Laravel backend: authenticated REST APIs, secret encryption, OAuth, AI module with external integrations, and multi-tenant business logic per company. Private beta — not yet open to the public.

profunded.title: Frontend Developer
profunded.description: Frontend-exclusive work for ProFunded. Built reusable UI components and carried out migration from Blade views to Next.js to improve maintainability, design consistency, and product scalability.

founder.title: Software Project Manager & Founder
founder.description: Founder and project manager at FluenceSoft, a software development company. Leading multiple development teams, overseeing project delivery, and ensuring high-quality software solutions for clients.

spm.title: Software Project Manager (SPM)
spm.description: Managed five development teams, ensuring project requirements were met on time. Provided training in ReactJS and React Native, supervised repositories, and integrated multiple codebases.

freelance.title: Full-Stack Developer
freelance.description: End-to-end freelance projects from design to production. Hydraulic Sistem: Astro + Supabase e-commerce, WhatsApp sales, SEO, deployed on Netlify (hydraulics-sistem.com). Eipet: full Next.js + Firebase frontend, orders module and area-based discounts (eipet.com.bo).

ui.stackIntegrityDescription: All projects undergo rigorous technical vetting and maintain a 98% uptime baseline during development cycles.

grb.title: GRB Group - Corporate Website
grb.description: Modern corporate website built with Astro for GRB Group, a global real estate company. Features elegant and professional design with intuitive navigation, dynamic sections, and SEO optimization to showcase real estate investment and technology services.

profunded.title: ProFunded - Prop Trading Platform
profunded.description: Frontend-exclusive development at ProFunded. Built reusable components in Next.js and migrated key views from Blade to Next.js to unify the UI system, speed up iteration, and improve platform performance.

rekaliber.title: Rekaliber - All-in-One Enterprise SaaS
rekaliber.description: All-in-one enterprise SaaS: credential vault with 2FA/TOTP, session proxy, workflow editor, task manager, team chat, and multi-LLM AI Hub with tool calling. I contributed full-stack to the Laravel backend: authenticated REST APIs, secret encryption, OAuth, AI module with external integrations, and multi-tenant business logic per company. Private beta — not yet open to the public.

rebornrental.title: Reborn Rental - Construction Equipment Rental
rebornrental.description: Construction equipment rental platform based in Denver, Colorado. Active frontend and backend contribution with a creative product overhaul, UX improvements, and continuous evolution on a Blade + Laravel PHP architecture with operational integrations.

reborn.title: Reborn Developments - Investment Platform
reborn.description: Web platform for international investments. I developed the backend in PHP Laravel and the frontend in Next.js. Deployed both on Hostinger with Cloudflare connected for the domain. Includes real estate project management, risk analysis, and global investment opportunities.

rebornhost.title: Reborn Host - Property Management
rebornhost.description: Site for Reborn Host, specialized in short-term rental property management for Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com and other platforms. Next.js frontend with PHP for email delivery. Deployed on Hostinger with Cloudflare connected for the domain.

eipet.title: Eipet - Pet Store E-commerce
eipet.description: Pet products e-commerce in Bolivia. I built the complete frontend and the full orders and area-based discounts modules. Stack with Next.js and Firebase as backend and database. Dog and cat catalog, cart, authentication, and admin panel.

hydraulics.title: Hydraulic Sistem - E-commerce Repuestos Hidráulicos
hydraulics.description: E-commerce for hydraulic parts and repair services for agricultural and heavy machinery. End-to-end project developed by me with Astro, Supabase database, and WhatsApp sales. Product catalog, cart, and quote requests. Live in production on Netlify with custom domain, SEO optimization, and full infrastructure setup.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: My name is Fabricio Rene Crespo Rossel, and I'm 22 years old. I have completed all academic semesters for Computer Systems Engineering, with only the final degree certification pending. I've been programming since I was 12, and I love both crafting interfaces and designing APIs and systems—true full-stack.
about.paragraph2: One of my significant achievements is delivering five deployment-ready projects at UMA for Universidad del Valle, which earned me a letter of recommendation from my department director.
about.paragraph3: I work as a Full-Stack Developer: frontend with Next.js, React, Astro, Tailwind CSS, and Figma; backend with Laravel, Firebase, and REST APIs. At Reborn Developments (Laravel + Next.js) and Reborn Host (Next.js + PHP) I handle deployment on Hostinger with Cloudflare. At Rekaliber I develop the Laravel backend for an all-in-one enterprise SaaS in private beta. Production freelance projects: Hydraulic Sistem (Astro, Supabase, Netlify) and Eipet (Next.js, Firebase). I also do DevOps with Dokploy, Hostinger VPS, and Cloudflare. Former Full Stack Team Leader at GoIT.
about.paragraph4: My goal is to keep growing as a full-stack developer—from UI and UX to APIs, databases and deployment—and as a project manager who ships quality software and leads teams effectively.
